name: Superior Mining International Corporation
summary: Superior Mining International Corporation engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold projects in Canada. It holds interest in the Jumping Moose Property that consists of 145 cell claims with an area of approximately 2658 hectares located in Burrows and Kemp townships, in the Larder Lake Mining Division of northeastern Ontario. The company was formerly known as Superior Mining Corporation and changed its name to Superior Mining International Corporation in May 2006. Superior Mining International Corporation was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
